headline: War Powers 60-day deadline arrives Friday as Hegseth faces Senate grilling over $25B war cost and Hormuz blockade standoff enters third month.
Secretary of State Rubio rejects Iran's Hormuz-first peace proposal as unacceptable, prolonging the 60-day US-Iran war and keeping global oil markets on edge at $105/barrel.
Iran vows the Strait of Hormuz will never return to its pre-war state as new peace proposal stalls, sending Brent crude surging past $107 and deepening the worst oil supply crisis in history.
